network_summary: Dr. Scott Inchun Yang, DDS is the founder/president/CEO of a small private multi-office dental group operating under the 'Glamour Dental Group' brand umbrella in Chicagoland. He is the authorized official on all three NPPES organization NPIs. Active confirmed locations include Glamour Dental South Chicago Heights (60411) and Metro Dental LLC in Logan Square Chicago (60647). The Des Plaines Metropolitan Dental Care (60016) is a stale/closed NPI shell — Yelp marks it CLOSED, the NPPES record has not been updated in ~18 years, and the active metropolitandentalcare.com now shows different dentists with no connection to Yang. No DSO/MSO/PE layer was found; 'Glamour Dental Group' is consistent with a dentist-owned group brand, not a third-party management platform.
owner_operator_identity: Dr. Scott Inchun Yang, DDS — Founder and President of Glamour Dental (glamourdental.net); CEO of Metro Dental LLC (confirmed via WebMD/directory). Bilingual in English, Spanish, and Korean. Education: B.S. University of Rochester; DMD Northwestern University.

evidence_chain: AO signal: INCHUN YANG is the NPPES authorized official on 3 IL GP org-NPIs across ZIPs 60016, 60411, 60647. Documentary corroboration found: (1) glamourdental.net lists Dr. Inchun Yang as 'Founder and President' with footer 'a Glamour Dental Group Office' — confirming owner identity and group brand at 60411 location. (2) WebMD/dental-directory snippets confirm Dr. Yang as CEO of Metro Dental LLC at 2746 W Fullerton Ave Chicago 60647 — corroborates the 60647 location. (3) Patch.com ribbon-cutting article confirms Dr. Scott Inchun Yang opened Metropolitan Dental Care in Des Plaines — corroborates the 60016 NPI origin, but Yelp now marks that location CLOSED and current website shows different dentists, indicating the Des Plaines shell is stale. No MSO/DSO/PE management layer found; Glamour Dental Group branding is consistent with a dentist-owned private group. Verdict: dentist_multi with gate_status=ready_for_validation for the two active locations; Des Plaines is stale/closed.
future_app_notes: 1. Des Plaines NPI 1043476856 (f790cf2484530188) should be reviewed for reclassification to solo_inactive or marked stale-closed — it is a Yang-originated shell that now has different operators at the address per current website. 2. Glamour Dental Group may have additional locations beyond the two active watched-IL ones (directory snippets mention 'other locations' and a Calumet City address) — worth checking if any other watched-IL ZIPs have Yang-associated NPIs not yet in this cluster. 3. No PE or MSO evidence found; if Yang sells to a DSO platform in future, this would upgrade to stealth_dso. 4. The 'Crossroads of America Dental' Calumet City listing is an additional Yang-associated address not in this cluster — may warrant a separate check if it falls in a watched ZIP.

classifications.reasoning: Dr. Yang originally opened Metropolitan Dental Care in Des Plaines (~2008) as confirmed by a local Patch.com ribbon-cutting article. However, this location is now marked CLOSED on Yelp (June 2026), the NPPES org NPI has not been updated in ~18 years, and the current metropolitandentalcare.com website shows completely different dentists with no connection to Yang. This is a stale/closed NPI shell — Yang's AO status on this NPI is a historical artifact. Gate_status is 'candidate' rather than 'ready_for_validation' because while the Yang-ownership origin is corroborated, the current operational status is closed/transferred, making this a false positive for any active GP denominator classification.
